3248350.name: Dungeon Patrol
3248350.description:
Is your dungeon infested with nasty ghouls, demons or goblins?

Trolls and zombies are eating your provisions and stinking up your corridors?

Our team of expert monster slayers can help you out!

KNIGHT is clad in sturdy armour and can withstand enemy attacks.

ELF can shoot arrows from a distance.

WIZARD can heal his teammates with magic.

HOUND is quick to collect the loot dropped by slain monsters.

Together, they are the DUNGEON PATROL.

Call 0800-DUNGEON and get a quote today!

DUNGEON PATROL is a top-down fantasy action adventure for 1-4 players. Choose a character, defeat enemies, solve puzzles and collect treasure!

In the game, you and up to three friends in local coop can pick from four different characters, each with different abilities, and fight your way through a level-based campaign. Fight diverse enemies, collect the coins they drop, and solve puzzles to unlock the level exit! The dangers you will face include hordes of enemies, physics objects like barrels and crates, mechanical traps and lethal turrets.
3248350.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
